pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Chibi Image Credits
pricing.subtitle: Start free, then upgrade when you need more monthly chibi generations for avatars, stickers, and creative projects.
pricing.free_desc: Best for trying the generator and making a few personal chibi images.
pricing.pro_desc: For creators who make avatars, character concepts, sticker ideas, and social content regularly.
pricing.pro_plus_desc: For heavier creative workflows and teams that need a larger monthly generation pool.
pricing.starter_desc: Perfect for trying the generator with more credits.
pricing.standard_desc: Most popular choice for regular chibi creators.
pricing.value_desc: Best value for heavy chibi generation needs.
